# PHIL.113 ? Product-Market Fit Obsession

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** customer_focus
**Subcategory:** product_market_fit_obsession
**Domain:** CUSTOMER_FOCUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Nothing else matters until you achieve product-market fit

## Application
Focus relentlessly on PMF, measure it rigorously, don't scale prematurely, iterate until fit is achieved

## Tags
philosophy, customer-focus, product-market-fit-obsession
